report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn pages covering EIP-7702 Smart Accounts and Passkey/Embedded Wallets — two high-value 2026 topics with zero existing coverage on the site.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: EIP-7702 shipped with Pectra upgrade (May 2025), introduces tx type 0x04 enabling EOAs to temporarily execute smart contract logic — 11K+ authorizations in first week, adopted by MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Trust Wallet, OKX

Passkey/embedded wallets market exploding: Coinbase Smart Wallet 1M+ users, Privy acquired by Stripe (75M+ wallets), Dynamic acquired by Fireblocks, Web3Auth rebranded as MetaMask Embedded, 30+ providers competing
Key trend: convergence of EIP-7702 native account abstraction with embedded wallet infrastructure creating a seed-phrase-free future
Hegotá upgrade (H2 2026) will bring EIP-7701 for native full L1 account abstraction as default
Circle launched a paymaster enabling gasless USDC transactions via EIP-7702
Global digital wallet users projected to exceed 5.2B by 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: EIP-7702 Smart Accounts Guide (720 lines) — 3 tabs covering what it is, how it works technically, and wallet/tool support. Includes EOA vs ERC-4337 vs EIP-7702 comparison table, paymaster mechanics, MetaMask setup guide, security risks

Passkey & Embedded Wallets Guide (867 lines) — 3 tabs covering passkey fundamentals, provider comparison, and getting started. Includes seed phrase vs MPC vs passkey comparison, 6-provider matrix (Coinbase/Privy/Dynamic/Web3Auth/Turnkey/Para), use cases, risk analysis

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: EIP-7702 page: title 'EIP-7702 Smart Accounts Guide 2026: Gasless Transactions & Account Abstraction | degen0x', target keyword 'EIP-7702 smart accounts', JSON-LD structured data, OG/Twitter meta
Passkey page: title 'Passkey Wallets & Embedded Wallets Guide 2026: No Seed Phrases Required | degen0x', target keyword 'passkey crypto wallets', 17-keyword array, OG/Twitter meta
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for indexing rollout
Internal linking opportunities: cross-reference between both pages (EIP-7702 ↔ Passkey wallets), link to existing smart-wallets-guide-2026, mpc-wallets-guide-2026, account-abstraction
